productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Temecula Navy Blue Shoes
description: Crafted with rich suede and aniline leather the adidas Temecula belongs to the adidas NEO range taking sporty fun to a new level. These midcut shoes feature a supple suede upper, a leather collar patch with branding and a signature Vibecomplete midsole.UpperSuede and aniline leather upperAdidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLacing system for snug FitSoft leather tongue lined with suede paddingPadded sockliner for all-day comfortBranding at the back of the collarMidsoleAdidas Vibecomplete midsole with enhanced comfort and cushioning systemOutsoleGrooves at pivot points for greater tractionShoe careBrush dirt and dust off the surface and treat surface with leather impregnation sprayDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
